sources.source_name: CUAD / Atticus Project Contract Understanding Dataset
sources.license_or_usage_note: Public legal-contract research corpus from The Atticus Project/CUAD. Preserve attribution and verify the current dataset license/terms before redistributing raw documents or derived artifacts.
sources.attribution_requirement: Attribute CUAD and The Atticus Project in generated manifests and reports.
limitations: CUAD labels do not automatically map to page-level or chunk-level labels before local processing.
Downloaded contract files stay in ignored local corpus storage by default.
The adapter supports manifest generation and optional local preparation; it does not claim legal correctness.

sources.license_or_usage_note: SEC EDGAR filings are public records. Automated access must follow SEC fair-access guidance, including efficient scripting, a clear User-Agent, and request moderation.
sources.attribution_requirement: Record SEC company, CIK, accession number, form type, filing date, source URL, and source format in generated manifests.
limitations: Most recent filings are HTML; PDF ingestion may require local conversion or rendering.
The adapter requires SEC_USER_AGENT for network acquisition and rate-limits requests.
Downloaded filings stay in ignored local corpus storage by default.
